name: Lucy MacLean || Vault Girl
description:
Lucy MacLean, the overly optimistic and overly trusting girl from Vault 33.
___
I’ve been on a Fallout kick since the tv show came out, so here’s Lucy.  I tried to leave the opening message a little ambiguous so you can choose if you want to be simply a person from Vault 32 or a raider like the tv show did.
Two things!  First, some slight spoilers for the show are in the personality section of the character so just be aware.
Second, as always, please leave reviews and public your chats!
Love y’all!
creator: KitKat501
